title: 100-Turn Playtest #3 — Post Round 3 Fixes

turn10Checkpoint.notes: AI building confirmed! Volt +2 outposts, Iron +2 outposts, Signal +1. Cult spawning: both static_remnants (4) and null_monks (2) active.

turn50Checkpoint.notes: All factions stable. Volt resources recovering (32→40). No combat yet — factions haven't encountered each other.

1_combatKills_gt_0.detail: 0 kills in 100 turns. Kill TRACKING works (verified in playtest #2.5 with 8 kills in 20 turns), but factions never encounter each other in this game. Small map with labyrinth walls may keep factions isolated. AI needs better exploration/attack pathing to find opponents.

2_AI_builds_beyond_starters.detail: Volt built 2 outposts, Iron built 2 outposts, Signal built 1 outpost by turn 10. Total buildings went from 8 to 13. FIX #33 CONFIRMED.

3_economy_sustains_past_turn_20.detail: Volt resources: 35→32→38→40 (dipped from building, recovered from harvesting, sustained at 40 through turn 100). Iron: 35→25 (spent on buildings). Economy does not flatline. FIX #34 CONFIRMED.

4_cult_units_6_to_12_at_turn_100.detail: 6 cult units at turn 100 (4 static_remnants + 2 null_monks). Within the 6-12 target range. Two of three cult sects active. FIX #35 CONFIRMED.

5_at_least_3_factions_survive.detail: All 4 civilized factions survive to turn 100 with full unit counts. No faction eliminated. This is the best survival result across all 3 playtests.

scorecard_summary: 4/5 PASS, 1 FAIL. Building, economy, cult balance, and survival all working. Combat never triggers because factions don't explore far enough to encounter each other.

playtest1_pre_fixes.assessment: Broken — cult overpowered, no economy, no buildings, mass extinction

playtest2_post_round2.assessment: Improved — harvesting works early, cult too low, still no buildings

playtest3_post_round3.assessment: Good — building works, economy sustains, cult balanced, all survive. Missing: combat encounters.

comparisonAcrossPlaytests.trend: Clear upward trajectory. Each fix round addresses a layer. Next priority: AI exploration + encounter generation.

remainingIssues.issue: AI factions never encounter each other
remainingIssues.detail: Factions stay near spawn, build outposts locally, but never send units to explore or engage enemies. Territory stays at 2-4% per faction. The AttackEvaluator and ExpandEvaluator may need higher desirability when territory is low, or units need explicit scouting/patrol behavior.

remainingIssues.issue: Building variety limited to outposts only
remainingIssues.detail: AI only builds outposts. Never builds motor_pool (unit fabrication), power_box (energy), or other building types. BuildEvaluator may only consider outposts.

remainingIssues.issue: Resources plateau — no growth after initial burst
remainingIssues.detail: Volt stabilized at 40, Iron at 25, Signal at 29. Resources don't grow past initial local salvage. AI doesn't send workers to distant deposits.
Only static_remnants and null_monks spawn. Third cult sect absent.

overallAssessment: MAJOR IMPROVEMENT over playtests 1 and 2. The game loop now has functioning harvest→build→sustain. Cult pressure is balanced. All factions survive. The missing piece is inter-faction engagement — AI needs exploration and attack pathing to create the combat encounters that drive the 4X endgame. Kill tracking works (verified separately) but combat never triggers in this map/seed.
